title: Project & HR Application Manager (m/w/d) in Hamburg
required_skills: Degree in Business Informatics, Computer Science or IT-related field
Several years experience in similar position
Project management experience, ideally in system administration
Knowledge of HR applications (rexx, HR Works, P&I Loga, ATOSS)
Hands-on mentality, structured process-oriented work style
bonus_skills: Knowledge of specific HR applications (rexx, HR Works)
matched_skills: Project management experience: HSBC PMO programme coordination
Stakeholder communication across hierarchy levels: HSBC C-suite reporting
German B1 (partial — role requires fluent German)
missing_skills: HR application management (rexx, HR Works, P&I Loga, ATOSS)
Fluent German (Boru is B1, role requires fluent)
core_responsibilities: Development and maintenance of HR applications (rexx, HR Works, P&I Loga, ATOSS)
Requirements definition and prioritisation with global stakeholders
Preparation of presentations and user manuals
recommended_emphasis: HSBC PMO stakeholder coordination across international teams
ECE Group reporting optimisation and documentation
summary: Score 22.2 (poor match). This role requires deep expertise in specific HR application systems and IT/system administration — neither of which Boru has. Additionally, fluent German is required while Boru is at B1 level. The specialised HR tech knowledge gap is fundamental. Not recommended.
